title: FIX: GitHub Pages Path Resolution - AVIF Images Return 404
problem: Gallery deployed to https://swipswaps.github.io/balloon-color-planner/ but relative paths ./assets/images/ resolve to wrong URL root
root_cause: GitHub Pages serves repo at /balloon-color-planner/ subdirectory. Relative paths don't account for this prefix.
solution: Use absolute paths /balloon-color-planner/assets/images/ in gallery-data.js + runtime path normalization for local dev
applicable_rules: RULE_7: EVIDENCE_BEFORE_ASSERTION - Test locally BEFORE committing
RULE_16: COMPLETE_WORKFLOW_TESTING - Local test + GitHub Pages verification
RULE_6: KNOWN_WORKING_CODE_ONLY - Path normalization proven pattern

steps.task_name: UPDATE generator script for GitHub Pages paths
steps.verbose_code_comment: Change path generation from './assets/images/filename.avif' to '/balloon-color-planner/assets/images/filename.avif'. This makes paths absolute from domain root, which matches GitHub Pages URL structure.

steps.action: Run node generate-gallery-data.js to update all 190 image paths
steps.verbose_code_comment: Execute generator to apply new path format to all images. Verify: 387 path references updated (190 images × 2 - default + color collections), all contain /balloon-color-planner/ prefix

steps.task_name: ADD path normalization script to index-photo.html
steps.action: Insert <script> before js/main.js that detects local vs GitHub Pages and converts paths
steps.verbose_code_comment: Add IIFE that: (1) detects if running on GitHub Pages by checking window.location.pathname for 'balloon-color-planner', (2) if NOT GitHub Pages (local dev), convert all paths from /balloon-color-planner/assets/images/ → ./assets/images/, (3) applies to defaultGallery.images AND all colorCollections. This ensures local dev works with relative paths while GitHub Pages works with absolute paths.

steps.task_name: LOCAL TEST: Verify page loads with correct paths
steps.action: Test http://localhost:8888/balloon-planner/index-photo.html - should load gallery with images
steps.expected_result: HTTP 200, gallery displays AVIF thumbnails, color filtering works
steps.verbose_code_comment: Test locally: (1) curl index-photo.html → HTTP 200, (2) check console DevTools F12 for no 404s, (3) verify images load (should show converted ./assets/images/ paths at runtime), (4) click color swatches - gallery should filter correctly

steps.task_name: LOCAL TEST: Verify browser DevTools shows no 404s
steps.action: Open browser DevTools Network tab, reload page, check for failed image requests
steps.expected_result: All AVIF files load (HTTP 200), no 404 errors in Network tab
steps.verbose_code_comment: Visual verification: Open http://localhost:8888/balloon-planner/index-photo.html in browser, press F12, go to Network tab, reload. All resources should show 200 status. Check for any failed requests to /assets/images/. If any 404s appear, path normalization failed.

steps.task_name: LOCAL TEST: Verify color filtering works
steps.action: Click color swatch buttons and verify gallery updates with correct subset
steps.expected_result: All 7 color families clickable, gallery shows correct arrangement count for each
steps.verbose_code_comment: Functional test: (1) Page loads all 190 arrangements, (2) Click 'White & Cream' → gallery shows 30 images, (3) Click 'Pink & Fuchsia' → gallery shows 50 images, (4) Click Reset → shows all 190 again, (5) Click arrangement thumbnail → main image updates, (6) No console errors in F12

steps.action: Stage generate-gallery-data.js and index-photo.html, commit with descriptive message
steps.applicable_rule: RULE_2: NO_PARTIAL_COMPLIANCE (workflow: edit → test → commit → push → verify)
steps.verbose_code_comment: Commit after local tests pass. Message: 'fix: Update image paths for GitHub Pages deployment. Change paths from relative ./assets/images/ to absolute /balloon-color-planner/assets/images/. Add runtime path normalization for local dev compatibility. Fixes 404 errors on GitHub Pages.'

steps.action: Push to remote repository (triggers GitHub Actions deploy)
steps.verbose_code_comment: Push commits to GitHub. GitHub Actions workflow will deploy changes to GitHub Pages. Wait for deployment to complete (check Actions tab).

steps.task_name: GITHUB PAGES VERIFICATION: Test deployed site
steps.expected_result: Page loads, all AVIF thumbnails visible and smooth, no broken images
steps.verbose_code_comment: Production verification on GitHub Pages: (1) Open https://swipswaps.github.io/balloon-color-planner/index-photo.html, (2) Wait for gallery to load (all 190 images), (3) Open DevTools Network tab, verify all images have 200 status, (4) Check for any 404 or CORS errors, (5) Verify no broken image icons (x in corners)

steps.task_name: GITHUB PAGES TEST: Verify color filtering
steps.action: Click color swatches on live GitHub Pages site
steps.expected_result: Gallery filters correctly, shows correct subset for each color family
steps.verbose_code_comment: Functional test on production: (1) Click 'White & Cream' swatch → see 30 images, (2) Click 'Navy' swatch → see 10 images, (3) Click Reset button → see all 190 again, (4) Click thumbnails to navigate, (5) No console errors in DevTools

After all tests pass (local + GitHub Pages), document: (1) What paths were changed and why, (2) How runtime normalization works, (3) Evidence of successful deployment (screenshots or curl output), (4) Confirmation that both local dev and GitHub Pages work

local_dev: No 404 errors in browser Network tab
github_pages: No 404 or CORS errors in Network tab
Gallery displays smooth AVIF edges (no blocky artifacts)
Color swatches clickable and filter correctly
Reset button returns to viewing all 190
